field.name: contract_json
field.eval: { 'view_orchestration': { 'context': { 'source': 'smart_construction_core.product_release', 'source_status': 'product_release' }, 'views': { 'form': { 'title': '进项发票', 'composition_mode': 'entry_semantic_surface', 'columns': 2, 'sections': [ {'title': '办理主信息', 'sequence': 10, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['state', 'validation_status', 'name', 'invoice_flow_label', 'source_origin', 'source_kind', 'business_category_id', 'direction']}, {'title': '项目与结算依据', 'sequence': 20, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['project_id', 'company_id', 'operation_strategy', 'partner_id', 'legacy_partner_name', 'contract_id', 'settlement_id', 'contract_amount']}, {'title': '发票基础信息', 'sequence': 30, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['document_no', 'document_date', 'application_date', 'invoice_date', 'recognition_date', 'invoice_state', 'invoice_no', 'invoice_code', 'invoice_type']}, {'title': '进项税务信息', 'sequence': 40, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['tax_rate', 'tax_type', 'invoice_content', 'cost_category_name', 'recipient_unit_name', 'caliber', 'invoice_company_type', 'invoice_issue_company', 'actual_invoice_issue_company', 'invoice_provider_name']}, {'title': '金额与税额', 'sequence': 50, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['invoice_count', 'amount_no_tax', 'tax_amount', 'amount_total', 'actual_invoice_amount', 'surcharge_amount', 'related_receipt_amount', 'currency_id']}, {'title': '办理与核算', 'sequence': 60, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['handler_name', 'invoice_holder', 'accounting_state', 'voucher_no', 'push_result', 'kingdee_document_no']}, {'title': '说明与附件', 'sequence': 70, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['note', 'note_display', 'attachment_ids', 'invoice_attachment_text', 'reject_reason']}, {'title': '红冲关联', 'sequence': 80, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['red_flush_adjustment_id', 'red_flush_origin_source_model', 'red_flush_origin_source_record_id', 'red_flush_origin_invoice_no']}, {'title': '来源追溯', 'sequence': 90, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['legacy_source_model', 'legacy_source_table', 'legacy_record_id', 'legacy_document_state', 'legacy_partner_id', 'creator_name', 'created_time', 'source_created_by', 'source_created_at', 'active']} ], 'fields': [ {'name': 'state', 'sequence': 10, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'validation_status', 'sequence': 20, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'name',
